targets.expr: sum by (object_type, service) (rate(sc_static_storage_object_size_bytes_sum{service="$service",storage_type="s3"}[$rate])) / sum by (object_type, service) (rate(sc_static_storage_object_size_bytes_count{service="$service",storage_type="s3"}[$rate]))

targets.expr: sum by (queue, service) (rate(sc_queue_items_enqueued_total{service="$service"}[1m])) - sum by (queue, service) (rate(sc_queue_items_dequeued_total{service="$service"}[1m]))

sum by (service, quantile) (rate(go_gc_duration_seconds_sum{service="$service"}[$rate])) 
/ 
sum by (service, quantile) (rate(go_gc_duration_seconds_count{service="$service"}[$rate]))
